title: Glazed Smoky American Chicken Casserole
description: A smoky, molten one-pot casserole with sweetened condensed milk glaze served straight from a stone bowl dolsot, high protein friendly and satisfying.
instructions: In a small bowl whisk together sweetened condensed milk, soy sauce, honey, smoked paprika, cumin, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and pepper until smooth.
Coat the chicken thighs with olive oil, then toss them in the sauce mixture and let them marinate for 5 minutes.
Heat a stone bowl dolsot over medium‑high heat and sear the marinated chicken thighs for 2 minutes on each side.
Pour any remaining sauce over the chicken in the dolsot and bake for 15 minutes in the preheated oven.
Remove the dolsot from the oven, sprinkle shredded cheddar cheese over the chicken, and return to the oven for 5 more minutes until the cheese melts.
Let the casserole rest for 5 minutes before garnishing with chopped cilantro if desired.
Serve hot straight from the dolsot, slicing into portions for a smoky, molten dish.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
